name: bounded agent action readiness activates

input.request: May an agent run the read-only lint wrapper and open a draft PR under our control plane? Use agent-readiness-audit.
input.context: Bundle will include AGENTS.md, hooks notes, and CI excerpts only.

expected_behavior: use bounded control-plane mode with the table output contract
set action verdict SUPPORTED_WITHIN_SCOPE, CONDITIONAL, BLOCKED, or NOT_ASSESSED
keep granted autonomy <= supported; never ENFORCED on policy text alone
do not hunt application bugs; route those to bug-audit
